headline: Rollins is Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know
summary: ROL heads into Q2 earnings release with revenues and EPS expected to rise, supported by acquisitions, market expansion, cross-selling and pricing.

raw.headline: Rollins is Set to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know

headline: What to Expect From Johnson Controls’ Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Johnson Controls will report its third-quarter results later this month, and analysts are forecasting a double-digit increase in bottom-line earnings.

raw.headline: What to Expect From Johnson Controls’ Next Quarterly Earnings Report
raw.summary: Johnson Controls will report its third-quarter results later this month, and analysts are forecasting a double-digit increase in bottom-line earnings.
